title: Techno%20Brain%20Trips+%20Brochure
content:
TRIPS+
Increase Productivity, Improve Compliance,
Take Control of Your Revenue
Total Revenue Integrity 
Processing System.

Techno Brain helps global enterprises flourish 
by providing leading technology, consulting, and outsourcing solutions. Since our inception in 1997, we have built our strategy around innovation, technology, and teamwork.
Headquartered in Nairobi, we have an international 
client base that includes governments, NGOs,  and private sector organisations. Our proven  ability to deliver solutions that help businesses  achieve their goals has earned us a reputation  as a preferred technology partner both in Africa  and internationally.
As a CMMI Level 5 company, our competencies 
and experience spans the full range of ICT services and solutions. These include:
 Business & Technology Consulting
 Implementation Services
 Custom Software development
 Business Process Outsourcing
 IT Enabled Services
 Product Development
 System Integration
 IT Training & Education
 IT Infrastructure Services
 Managed IT ServicesTrips+ is the answer to this complex set of challenges. It is designed by tax administration and modernisation experts to deliver improvement in all aspects of revenue administration. Trips+ improves compliance and transparency with multi-channel support, and helps build a better tax base; offering enhanced functionality to taxpayers and administrators.
Techno Brain – Africa’s leading 
custom software providerTransf orming Rev enue 
Governanc e & A dministr ation
…TRIPS is an integrated configurable solution and 
makes use of a modern technological platform. Its high score on the A TO capability model, combined with its wide presence in developing countries, makes it a solution that has to be considered.
Information Technology in Tax Administration  
in Developing Countries, July 2015
The demands placed on tax and revenue administrations are increasing. 
Governments are under pressure to maintain or increase revenue by enabling voluntary compliance and at the same time, taxpayers expect greater transparency along with faster and better service.

Increased productivity
Staff are freed from mundane and  
repetitive tasks which are handled  
seamlessly by Trips+ and can focus  
on high value add activities.
Clear insight
Understand your taxpayers,  
understand your operations through  
inbuilt metrics and business intelligence  
tools. Take informed decisions.Improved compliance
Improved service makes it easy  
for taxpayers to comply.  
Shift organisational focus to  
reducing non-compliance.
Revenue Growth
Take control of your revenue  
and drive growth.We know that a modern tax administration must deliver in key areas – 
accuracy, security, simplicity, and transparency. At the same time, we also appreciate the importance of value for money within the public sector. Trips+ is designed to allow you to take advantage of the benefits as soon as possible.
With the advent of Trips+, the business of tax 
administration is transformed by information technology. Taxpayer compliance is supported through a process of self-service, tax officers are released for more interesting and productive areas of work, and the bond between the state and citizens is strengthened.  
Improved efficiency and service
Trips+ delivers operational efficiencies allowing targeting of scarce resources to maximise efficiency, while improving the quality of tax officers’ work with sophisticated tax analysis and management reporting and tools facilitating multi-channel communications with taxpayers.
Increased revenue and compliance
Specifically, the benefits include increased revenue and compliance through better risk management and more targeted audits. The Integrated Taxpayer ledger and services within Trips+ provides the tax administration with a holistic view of the Taxpayer’s affairs. It allows the tax authority to conduct its business in a fair and transparent way. Enhanced strategic intelligence  
and growth
The Trips+ system draws on our wide expertise and 
experience in tax and revenue processes, and in the application of international best practice.
Trips+ helps in realising reform goals and strategic 
planning. It assists in strengthening public finances and takes account of factors that affect those finances.  Laid across the business functions are a variety of management and risk analysis tools and features, which provide the holistic and risk based view of the Taxpayer. 
Tax policy support
Don’t let the system constrain your ability to respond to change. Trips+ provides support for short, medium and long term tax policy and revenue strategies. Seamlessly allowing tax administrators to configure and add new tax and revenue streams, manage legislative changes, change business rules in line with evolving needs and requirements using user friendly tools and processes.The tax system that adds value 
Effective tax systems are central to effective states. Taxes provide the 
resources to help fund public services and other investments that are key to growth. The right policy needs to go hand in hand with efficient collection to maximise the potential. 


Flexible, easy to use, simple to connect.
Trips+ has been designed for the user – it’s easy to use for tax officials and taxpayers, it’s 
simple to connect to other systems, and it’s flexible in work-flow and business processes. It is a true enterprise solution providing innovation across the entire architecture.

Transaction Manager Data Manager JMSESB ServerDesigned with our customers and end-users in 
mind, the entire Trips+ solution is message driven, with all functionality delivered by independent and re-usable web services. Additional supplementary services are built around the core business processes and any service can be made available for integration with third party systems.
Our focus on business process innovation also 
means that we have a flexible approach to solutions. This is to allow continuous improvement but also to allow tax agencies to introduce the technology at the right pace for their organisation. This is true regardless of the current level, lack or complexity of their existing automation.
Naturally people are still at the heart of interactions, 
and we do understand the importance of the individual in driving change. Using a blended approach, we aim to ensure that clients, employees and taxpayers can realise the benefits of any change rapidly and visibly. 
As a result, part of ensuring consistent uptake is 
the simplicity of use – requiring minimal training, and allowing online web access to transact business immediately and in ‘real time’. This facilitates and delivers tax administration at all levels including central, regional and local.
Trips+ uses proven technology with the 
architecture implemented using SOA design principles.  This allows for ease of configuration for individual clients while integrated workflow management technology is seamlessly integrated and orchestrates the business process rules within the Trips+ modules. User-friendly intelligent design
Trips+ is a true enterprise solution providing the best in technical 
innovation across its architecture. Both the physical and logical separation of the core layers and component services ensure complete security and absolute scalability.
…part of ensuring consistent uptake is the simplicity of use – requiring minimal training, and allowing online web access to transact business immediately and in ‘real time’.

Taxpayer registration with  
biometric integration
Offers full integration with existing e-Government 
Portals. It can also be implemented independently and interfaced with third party applications. Trips+ can also check third party agency and biometric databases for validation to accept, reject or refer for future validation.
Accounting and revenue collection
Includes a fully functional taxpayer accounting module that records all financial transactions. This provides a ‘taxpayer-centric’ view of a taxpayer’s financial activities, and delivers Revenue Collection management features.  Trips+  integrates with existing enterprise accounting solutions using industry standard API’s.
Intelligence and risk management
The fully integrated intelligence and risk management solution maximises selectivity  and targeting effectiveness of tax audits.  Audit selection is automated, reducing direct intervention by tax officers, speeding up the  process and reducing risk of corruption. Profiles  are created directly from intelligence using the  risk analysis engine. 
Returns filing
Delivers seamless, automated electronic processing with the unique ability to add and configure new regime types, or change existing types without the need for development or re-deployment. This includes changing the workflow and the applicable taxes and rates.  Online self-service
Deliver significant benefits to taxpayers when using Trips+ e-service capabilities. Provides a cost efficient and effective channel of communication, improving compliance and revenue, reducing costs, increasing transparency and equity and enhancing services to citizens. 
Integration API’s
The core Trips+ application architecture is built on SOA industry standards. Web Services are engineered for configurability, security, reliability and seamless integration with external agencies.
Advanced case management scheduling
The case management module is fully configurable with rules, workflow and notification services for any case type required. A number of functions generate specific pre-configured case types, while offering the ability to integrate with industry standard case management solutions. 
Workflow driven task management 
At the core of Trips+ are the administration, task management and application management tools, which deliver flexibility and security throughout the solution. Notifications, approvals, reviews and tasks can be configured. This includes changing the workflow for any of the functions that can be applied using any combination of business rules.User configurable taxes, duties and fees
All taxes and duties and fees can be configured by users through the system administration module’s ‘tax manager’ function without the need for any customisation. All tax configuration rules are fully versioned with effective dates.
Management Information 
Fully integrated reporting and business intelligence tool. It enables the production of standard reports and also provides a powerful, user-friendly, drag-and-drop tool to allow for the fast and easy creation of ad-hoc reports, charts and dashboards.
Business Intelligence and  
performance metrics
Measure and manage your Business performance 
with embedded BI and analytics tools. Define your performance metrics and keep track of progress and performance on your customisable Trips+ Management dashboards.
Web Chat & Customer Service
Encourage compliance and increase taxpayer satisfaction though fully integrated customer service across all channels. Access knowledge bases through portal services from computer or phone, text, call or chat with an advisor online. Track progress on active cases wherever and whenever convenient.The stand-out features

Trips+ improves compliance 
and transparency with  multi-channel support,  and helps build a better  tax base; offering enhanced functionality to taxpayers and administrators.
Trips+ is designed and proven to help revenue authorities improve their 
performance. Find out more about how Trips+ could work for you and your requirements – both today and tomorrow.
